zh.Lorraine, Holy Roman Empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根
zh.lifeSummary: 當Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie於大約0997年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根時，他的父親Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie32歲，母親Urraca d'Ivrea34歲。他於大約1025年與Doda von Henneberg結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1069年12月24日在法國洛萊姆斯維爾頓享年73歲。

zh-hans.Lorraine, Holy Roman Empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie于大约0997年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根时，他的父亲Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie32岁，母亲Urraca d'Ivrea34岁。他于大约1025年与Doda von Henneberg结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1069年12月24日在法国洛萊姆斯維爾頓享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie was born about 0997, in Lorraine, Holy Roman Empire, his father, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, was 32 and his mother, Urraca d'Ivrea, was 34. He married Doda von Henneberg about 1025. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 24 December 1069, in Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, France, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie est né environ 0997, à Lorraine, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Urraca d'Ivrea, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Doda von Henneberg environ 1025. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 décembre 1069, à Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie um 0997 in Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie 32 und seine Mutter Urraca d'Ivrea 34. Er hat um 1025 Doda von Henneberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Dezember 1069 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Verdun, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie è nato il circa 0997 nel Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Urraca d'Ivrea, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Doda von Henneberg circa 1025. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 dicembre 1069, nel Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.Lorraine, Holy Roman Empire: ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチロスリンジェン
ja.lifeSummary: Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingieが約0997年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチロスリンジェンで生まれた時，父Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingieは32歳，母Urraca d'Ivreaは34歳であった。約1025年にDoda von Hennebergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1069年12月24日にフランスロレィヌメウゼバーダンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie(이)가 대략 0997년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 로스링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Urraca d'Ivrea(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1025년 Doda von Henneberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1069년 12월 24일 프랑스 로레이인 우스 베르던에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie nasceu aproximadamente 0997, em Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Urraca d'Ivrea, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Doda von Henneberg aproximadamente 1025. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1069, em Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, França, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie родился около 0997 г. в местности лотринген, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Urraca d'Ivrea, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Doda von Henneberg около 1025 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 декабря 1069 г. в местности вирдун, меус, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godefroid II de Basse-Lotharingie nació aproximadamente 0997, en Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Gothelon de Verdun duc de Lotharingie, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Urraca d'Ivrea, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Doda von Henneberg aproximadamente 1025. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de diciembre de 1069, en Verdun, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 73 años.
